message:
refactor(cli): extract buildSessionDataFromStorage to module level

Fix code duplication in score/feedback/leaderboard commands:

- Extract buildSessionDataFromStorage helper to module level
- Replace ~200 lines of duplicated mapping code with single function call
- Fix potential division by zero in leaderboard percentage calculation:
  `score.maxScore === 0 ? 0 : Math.round(...)`

DRY principle: the mapping logic from storage types to Artifact sections
is now maintained in one place instead of three.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
